form.formComment: Resuming after a break; at only start last campaign finished tenth of 11 starters at Exeter on January 9 over 3300m, 102 len behind Mortal Coil with 67.5kg at $101. Hard to enthuse off the first run and happy to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Resuming after a break; at only start last campaign finished tenth of 11 starters at Exeter on January 9 over 3300m, 102 len behind Mortal Coil with 67.5kg at $101. Hard to enthuse off the first run and happy to overlook.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished fourth of 11 runners at Exeter on January 9 over 3300m, 16 len behind Mortal Coil carrying 71kg at $6.50. Last start finished third of 12 runners at Taunton on February 26 over 3300m, 8 len behind Rices Pool with 71kg at $13. Well-placed and appeals as an each-way chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Third-up today. First-up finished fourth of 11 runners at Exeter on January 9 over 3300m, 16 len behind Mortal Coil carrying 71kg at $6.50. Last start finished third of 12 runners at Taunton on February 26 over 3300m, 8 len behind Rices Pool with 71kg at $13. Well-placed and appeals as an each-way chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only had one start last when he favourite; won by 0.5 len Umma House P2p on October 19 over 4828m defeating Nikolavs Otto carrying 57.5kg in a jumps. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only had one start last when he favourite; won by 0.5 len Umma House P2p on October 19 over 4828m defeating Nikolavs Otto carrying 57.5kg in a jumps. Makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Is third-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Last start finished third of 7 starters at Plumpton on March 9 over 3600m, 7 len behind Otie's Friend with 67.5kg at $15 and before that finished seventh of 14 runners at Kempton Park on February 2 over 3200m, 26 len behind Lover Desbois carrying 67.5kg at $17. Impressed last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). Is third-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Last start finished third of 7 starters at Plumpton on March 9 over 3600m, 7 len behind Otie's Friend with 67.5kg at $15 and before that finished seventh of 14 runners at Kempton Park on February 2 over 3200m, 26 len behind Lover Desbois carrying 67.5kg at $17. Impressed last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: This Walk In The Park bred gelding is now four-year-old and his having his first race start. Not seen on the track yet so hard to assess. Nice profile and expected to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). This Walk In The Park bred gelding is now four-year-old and his having his first race start. Not seen on the track yet so hard to assess. Nice profile and expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last preparation ran on from midfield; ran last at Chepstow on January 27 over 3200m, on slow going 107 len behind Keltype with 61.5kg at $201. When resuming last campaign ran last at Wincanton on November 20 over 3000m, 27 len behind Bailly's Comet carrying 66.5kg at $51. This might test him.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last preparation ran on from midfield; ran last at Chepstow on January 27 over 3200m, on slow going 107 len behind Keltype with 61.5kg at $201. When resuming last campaign ran last at Wincanton on November 20 over 3000m, 27 len behind Bailly's Comet carrying 66.5kg at $51. This might test him.

form.formComment: Having third race start. Was promising at debut finished second of 8 runners at Nancy on September 28 over 2500m, on heavy track; 2 len behind Malissa Mans carrying 62kg. Went for a spell before returning finished fifth of 10 starters at Kempton Park on March 14 over 3200m, 11 len behind Prince Rupert with 70kg at $5. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB

Was promising at debut finished second of 8 runners at Nancy on September 28 over 2500m, on heavy track; 2 len behind Malissa Mans carrying 62kg. Went for a spell before returning finished fifth of 10 starters at Kempton Park on March 14 over 3200m, 11 len behind Prince Rupert with 70kg at $5. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Is second-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Last start ran last at Chepstow on February 21 over 3200m, on slow going 148 len behind Bande Organisee carrying 62kg at $67. Not too keen on her chances here.
